verdict_reason: The verse does not claim the Gita is 'really about' staff engineering. The engineering layer explicitly says 'On the path just opened — buddhi-yoga, action issuing from a settled intelligence — only one decision exists' — i.e., the path is buddhi-yoga, and the engineering analog is one operational reflection of it. The transliterated Sanskrit (vyavasāya, buddhi, bahu-śākhā) is preserved as load-bearing; the engineering vocabulary is offered alongside, not as a substitute. The source pack's traditional_meaning_consensus is preserved unaltered. PASS.
